description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has a concurrency policy that cancels in-progress runs of the same workflow. It consists of two jobs: check and tests. The check job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, outputs environment variables, sets up Python 3.7, installs dependencies, and runs checks with tox. The tests job depends on the check job, runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python versions from 3.7 to 3.11, checks out the repository, sets up Python, installs dependencies, and runs tests with tox.
